hero.section: relative py-20 px-4 bg-gradient-to-b from-[#f0f9ff] via-white to-transparent overflow-hidden
hero.blob1: absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-[600px] h-[600px] bg-gradient-to-bl from-[#0a91b1]/10 to-blue-500/10 rounded-full blur-3xl animate-blob animation-delay-4000
hero.blob2: absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-[500px] h-[500px] bg-gradient-to-tr from-sky-500/10 to-[#0a91b1]/10 rounded-full blur-3xl animate-blob
hero.subtitle: inline-block px-4 py-1.5 mb-4 text-sm font-medium rounded-full bg-[#0a91b1]/10 text-[#0a91b1] border border-[#0a91b1]/20
hero.title: text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6
hero.imageBlob1: absolute -top-6 -right-6 w-32 h-32 bg-[#0a91b1]/10 rounded-full blur-lg
hero.imageBlob2: absolute -bottom-6 -left-6 w-32 h-32 bg-blue-500/10 rounded-full blur-lg
hero.image: relative z-10 rounded-2xl shadow-xl w-full h-auto

services.card: group p-8 bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl border border-gray-100 transition-all duration-300
services.iconContainer: w-14 h-14 mb-6 rounded-xl bg-[#0a91b1]/10 flex items-center justify-center group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-300
services.cardTitle: text-xl font-semibold mb-4 text-gray-900 group-hover:text-[#0a91b1] transition-colors

awards.blob1: absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-[600px] h-[600px] bg-gradient-to-bl from-cyan-500/10 to-blue-500/10 rounded-full blur-3xl animate-blob animation-delay-4000
awards.blob2: absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-[500px] h-[500px] bg-gradient-to-tr from-sky-500/10 to-cyan-500/10 rounded-full blur-3xl animate-blob
awards.subtitle: inline-block px-4 py-1.5 mb-4 text-sm font-medium rounded-full bg-gray-800/50 text-cyan-400 backdrop-blur-sm border border-gray-700
awards.title: text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold text-white mb-6
awards.card: bg-gray-800/50 backdrop-blur-sm p-8 rounded-xl border border-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-800/80 transition-all duration-300
awards.cardYear: inline-block px-3 py-1 bg-cyan-600 text-white text-sm rounded-full mb-3

workflow.section: relative py-24 px-4 bg-gradient-to-b from-white via-[#0a91b1]/5 to-white
workflow.subtitle: inline-block px-4 py-1.5 mb-4 text-sm font-medium rounded-full bg-[#0a91b1]/10 text-[#0a91b1] border border-[#0a91b1]/20
workflow.title: text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6
workflow.cta: inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 bg-[#0a91b1] hover:bg-[#097d99] text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-lg transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-0.5
workflow.imageBlob: absolute -top-6 -right-6 w-32 h-32 bg-[#0a91b1]/10 rounded-full blur-lg
workflow.image: relative z-10 rounded-2xl shadow-xl w-full h-auto

platforms.logoContainer: flex flex-wrap justify-center items-center gap-8 md:gap-16

animations.blob: keyframes { 0% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1) rotate(0deg); } 33% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.1) rotate(120deg); } 66% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(0.9) rotate(240deg); } 100% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1) rotate(360deg); } }
